meta.title: Channel Update  - Playlists, Repos, Collabs, Grants, Memberships
meta.description:

TIMESTAMPS:
00:00:00 - Introduction to 18-month channel update
00:00:29 - Overview of five main categories: fine tuning, inference, vision, audio, and evals
00:01:14 - Publishing schedule: Mondays 2pm and Fridays 9am Irish time
00:04:15 - Introduction of developer collab program
00:04:51 - Overview of Trelis Grants program
00:05:29 - Introduction of YouTube memberships with three tiers
00:06:45 - Fine tuning content and repo
00:09:54 - Inference content and repo
00:12:44 - Vision models and support
00:14:21 - Audio/transcription features
00:15:35 - NEW evals content and repo
00:16:35 - Request for feedback on content direction
00:17:03 - Closing remarks
